creator: fernan@unsam.edu.ar
text:
I have both postgresql82-client/server ports installed.

I cannot fetch postgresql83:

gama# cd /usr/ports/databases/postgresql83-server/
gama# make fetch-recursive
===> Fetching all distfiles for postgresql-server-8.3.1 and dependencies
===>  postgresql-server-8.3.1 cannot install: the port wants postgresql83-client but you have postgresql82-client installed.
*** Error code 1

I don't want to 'install' postgresql83, just fetch it!
